name: ai-runtime
description: Runtime guardrails for an AI agent platform: ingest MCP-proxy traffic, detect prompt injection / tool drift / system-prompt extraction / tool-output exfiltration / agent credential leak, and quarantine the offending tool under HITL approval. Aligned with MITRE ATLAS and the OWASP LLM / OWASP MCP Top 10. The MCP tool quarantine is the only write path; --apply requires _approval_context with min_approvers >= 2.
